title: roettlera humilis
intro: Roettlera humilis, also known as the Humilis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, Roettlera humilis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation, due to its high concentration of essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Roettlera humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Roettlera humilis is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in aromatherapy to harness its therapeutic benefits.
